subject: Vendor Onboarding full UI v4
observedOutcome: YAPK installed successfully but generated application quality remained below approved mockups and full-scope expectations.

gapFindings.finding: v0.6.2 predates later strict visual quality and composition-checklist work.
Current dist skill mirrors include newer guidance but the v0.6.2 archive is stale for key application-generation skills.
The generator can satisfy section-level requirements with low-quality controls because no reusable high-quality templates are mandatory.
Composition and strict visual gates still need template conformance, runtime visual metrics, and screenshot review.
Feature studies prove individual controls and bindings, not automatically composed full-application design quality.
